texto: Raymond collected expressions. He repeated them in experimental accents, as if learning a tune. He sounded like an Eighteenth Street Mexican when he said cuate, like a Logan Square cubano when he said comemierda.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Sebastian Rotella: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a sabedoria. O trecho “Raymond collected expressions. He repeated them in experimental accents, as if learning a tune. H…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que sabedoria, expression, language pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de language.

texto: Pescatore marveled at the seascape. It gave him vertigo. The wind deployed cloud formations. The sun seared the Moroccan coastline. He had read a line once about "the lion-colored hills of Africa." Were they lion-colored? What color was a lion exactly?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Sebastian Rotella que provoca esforço, persistência e resultados. Ao questionar “Pescatore marveled at the seascape. It gave him vertigo. The wind deployed cloud formations. The …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre sucesso, africa, coastline, com foco em coastline e landscape.

texto: The reality is that many of us in these parts are not enamored of Paris." The Commandant gulped down his coffee. "I worked there as a young officer in the CRS, the riot squad. I speak from personal experience. Paris is bizarre. Paris is a museum surrounded by a jungle.
